address.address1: 11, Lampriek, Bandar Baru, Kuta Alam, Banda Aceh, Indonesia, Banda Aceh

advanceGuaranteeProgram.description: Agoda Preferred recommends trusted and verified properties that have a long-standing relationship with Agoda and meet certain criteria.

nearbyPlaces.name: Ikatan Dokter Indonesia Cabang Banda Aceh

description.short: Get your trip off to a great start with a stay at this property, which offers free Wi-Fi in all rooms. Conveniently situated in the Banda Aceh part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options. Don't leave before paying a visit to the famous Sultan Iskandar Muda International Airport.  This 4-star property is packed with in-house facilities to improve the quality and joy of your stay.

details.title: Infant 0-2 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding. Note, if you need a cot, it may incur an extra charge and is subject to availability.

details.title: Children 3-6 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding.

adult: Guests 7 years and older are considered adults.
extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

reviews.hotelName: Dancenter Kuta Alam Near Masjid Oman Al-Makmur Formerly Daka Hotel

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: Dancenter Kuta Alam Near Masjid Oman Al-Makmur Formerly Daka Hotel
comments.responseText:
Dear Khairisya,

Terima kasih banyak atas ulasan positifnya! Kami sangat senang mendengar bahwa Anda merasa puas dengan kamar yang luas, AC yang sejuk, serta fasilitas lengkap seperti kamar mandi bersih, gantungan baju, TV, lemari, dan meja rias besar.

Kami di Dancenter Kuta Alam Near Masjid Oman Al-Makmur (sebelumnya Daka Hotel) sangat menghargai kepercayaan Anda dan berharap dapat menyambut Anda kembali di lain waktu.

Salam hangat,
Yusuf
Tim Dancenter Kuta Alam Near Masjid Oman Al-Makmur
comments.reviewComments: The room is spacious for such a low price, the air conditioning is pleasantly cool, the bathroom is clean, and there are many clothes hangers in the room which are very helpful! There is a TV, a wardrobe, and a large dressing table.
comments.originalComment: Kamar nya luas untuk harga semurah itu, ac nya dingin sejuk terasa, kamar mandi bersih dan banyak gantungan baju di kamar yg sangat membantu! Ada tv, lemari, meja rias yang besarrr

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: Dancenter Kuta Alam Near Masjid Oman Al-Makmur Formerly Daka Hotel

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: Dancenter Kuta Alam Near Masjid Oman Al-Makmur Formerly Daka Hotel
comments.responseText:
Teuku yang terhormat,

Terima kasih atas penilaian sempurna dan umpan balik Anda yang luar biasa! Kami senang mendengar bahwa Anda merasa lokasi kami strategis, kamarnya luas untuk keluarga Anda, dan harganya sangat terjangkau.

Kami berharap dapat menyambut Anda dan keluarga kembali di Dancenter Kuta Alam Dekat Masjid Oman Al-Makmur di masa mendatang!

Salam hangat,
Rosy
Dancenter Kuta Alam Dekat Masjid Oman Al-Makmur (Sebelumnya Daka Hotel)
comments.reviewComments: Location in the city center, spacious room for a family with 2 teenagers...very affordable price on the app...definitely worth it.
comments.originalComment: Lokasi dipusat kota, kamar luas utk keluarga dgn 2 anak remaja....harga sangat murah di app...sangat wort it

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: Dancenter Kuta Alam Near Masjid Oman Al-Makmur Formerly Daka Hotel
comments.reviewNegatives: Estaba sucio, el baño sucio, muy mal olor, no hablaban inglés. La habitación con basura en el piso y en los muebles. Las sabanas usadas. Personas super extrañas. No pude dormir allí y finalmente cambié de hotel por el miedo que me dió. Vengo de un viaje largo por varios sitios y sólon aquí me senti insegura. No lo recomiendo!

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: Dancenter Kuta Alam Near Masjid Oman Al-Makmur Formerly Daka Hotel
comments.responseText:
Sri yang terhormat,

Terima kasih atas penilaian sempurna dan umpan balik yang luar biasa! Kami senang Anda menikmati AC dan mendapatkan nilai terbaik di Dancenter Kuta Alam (sebelumnya Daka Hotel). Kami sangat menghargai kata-kata baik Anda dan berharap dapat menyambut Anda kembali segera!

Salam hangat,
Maria
Tim Dancenter Kuta Alam
comments.reviewComments: It should be priced below 100,000. But the room facilities already have air conditioning. It's really cool overall. Thank you, Hotel Daka. ☺️
comments.originalComment:
Dapat yang harga dibawah 100rb. Tapi fasilitas kmaar sudah pakai Ac. Kerenlah pokoknya.
Terimakasih Hotel Daka. ☺️

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: Dancenter Kuta Alam Near Masjid Oman Al-Makmur Formerly Daka Hotel
comments.responseText:
Dear Dyta,

Terima kasih atas ulasan dan masukannya. Kami senang Anda puas dengan pelayanan dan lokasi kami. Terkait TV dan WiFi di lantai 3, kami mohon maaf atas ketidaknyamanan yang terjadi. Masukan Anda sangat berarti dan akan kami tindak lanjuti untuk perbaikan fasilitas sesuai yang dijanjikan. Kami harap dapat menyambut Anda kembali dengan pengalaman yang lebih baik.

Salam hangat,
Dancenter Kuta Alam Near Masjid Oman Al-Makmur
comments.reviewComments: The place is nice and the service is very good. The facilities for TV and Wi-Fi are stated in the booking, but on the 3rd floor, there is no Wi-Fi and the TV is not working. Therefore, please repair the TV and install Wi-Fi on the 3rd floor as per the facilities mentioned in the booking. If available, please ensure it functions properly. In the future, we will book again to see if this hotel can improve the facilities according to the booking. Please the hotel should enhance the facilities and quality in accordance with what is available in the booking. Thank you.
comments.reviewTitle: Good service, nice place. Please provide Wi-Fi on the 3rd floor and fix the TV according to the order that has been specified.
comments.originalTitle: Pelayanan baik, tempat bagus. Wifi dilantai 3 mohon disediakan dan tv diperbaiki sesuai pemesanan yg sudh tertera
comments.originalComment: Tempatnya bagus dan pelayanan sangat baik. fasilitas tv dan wifi tertera di pemesanan tetapi di lantai 3 wifi tidak ada dan tv tidak berfungsi. Jadi mohon untuk tv diperbaiki dan pemasangan wifi dilantai 3 sesuai fasilitas yang sudah tertulis di dalam pemesanan. jika tersedia maka mohon berfungsi dengan baik. Kedepan kami akan memesan kembali memastikan apakah hotel ini dapat perbaikan fasilitas sesuai pemesanan. Mohon pihak hotel ditingkat kembali fasilitas dan kualitas hotel sesuai pemesanan tersedia. Terima kasih

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: Dancenter Kuta Alam Near Masjid Oman Al-Makmur Formerly Daka Hotel
comments.responseText:
Tamu yang terhormat,

Kami sangat menyesal mendengar pengalaman Anda dan dengan tulus meminta maaf atas ketidaknyamanan yang ditimbulkan. Masukan Anda akan kami tanggapi dengan serius, dan kami akan meninjau masalah ini untuk memastikan layanan dan kejelasan yang lebih baik bagi tamu di masa mendatang.

Salam hangat,
Lisa
Dancenter Kuta Alam Dekat Masjid Oman Al-Makmur Sebelumnya Hotel Daka
comments.reviewComments: The pricing is definitely competitive.  Facilities wise, don't hope for star hotel quality, more like a homestay vibe and facilities. Room has attached bathroom but lack of basin and hot water. Mattress and the room need upgrades desperately. However with the super affordable pricing, it's worth for short stay. The hotel located a bit further away from city centre, but there are quite a lot of cafes and warongs and eateries nearby within walking distance.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: Dancenter Kuta Alam Near Masjid Oman Al-Makmur Formerly Daka Hotel
comments.responseText:
"Dear Yona,
Thank you for your review and 7.2 rating. We’re sorry for the inconvenience you experienced with room allocation, facilities, and maintenance. Your feedback is very helpful, and we’ll work to ensure better comfort and service at Dancenter Kuta Alam Near Masjid Oman Al-Makmur (Formerly Daka Hotel).

Warm regards,
Dancenter Kuta Alam Near Masjid Oman Al-Makmur (Formerly Daka Hotel)"
comments.reviewComments: In my honest opinion, I would rather not stay here and lose my money. I booked more than a month before the booking date, I requested a double bed but was given a single bed, which caused my child to fall into the gap between the beds. I asked for a room on the first floor but got a room on the third floor, with no lift and a lot of luggage for a small child. The mattress in my room is already sagging and not flat anymore, causing back pain. The parking is full of motorcycles, and very early in the morning we were asked to move our car, luckily we were already checking out. There are broken tiles in the room, and the broken pieces are just left there. I hope the hotel management pays more attention to its facilities, even though the hotel building is old.
comments.reviewTitle: I was supposed to stay here for 2 nights, but I chose only 1 night even though I had already made the payment through the app.
comments.originalTitle: Seharusnya 2x nginap disini, tapi saya memilih cuma 1x walau sudah terlanjur bayar booking diaplikasi
comments.originalComment:
Opini jujur saya, saya rela tidak jadi menginap disini dan kehilangan uang. Saya sudah pesan sebulan lebih dari tgl booking, saya minta double bed dikasih single bed akhirnya anak saya terperosok ketengah kasur yg didempetkan. Saya minta lantai 1, dikasih lantai 3, no lift dgn barang bawaan anak kecil yg banyak. Kasur yg dikamar saya sudah terasa pernya, dan sudah mulai miring tidak datar bikin sakit pinggang. Parkiran penuh dgn motor, pagi2 banget sudah diminta utk pindahkan mobil untung kami juga sudah mau check out.
Keramik dikamar sudah ada yg pecah2 tapi pecahan keramik dibiarkan begitu saja didalam kamar.
Semoga pihak pengelola hotel memperhatikan kembali fasilitasnya, walaupun bangunan hotel lama.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: Dancenter Kuta Alam Near Masjid Oman Al-Makmur Formerly Daka Hotel
comments.responseText:
Halo Bang,
Terima kasih atas ulasan Anda. Mohon maaf atas ketidaknyamanan karena tidak tersedia tempat sampah di dalam kamar. Kami akan segera menindaklanjuti agar fasilitas ini dapat tersedia untuk kenyamanan Anda.

Salam,
Dancenter Kuta Alam Near Masjid Oman Al-Makmur Formerly Daka Hotel
comments.reviewComments: We have difficulty throwing away trash because we have to leave the room to find a trash bin.
comments.reviewTitle: There is no trash can in the room.
comments.originalTitle: Tidak tersedia tong sampah di dalam kamar
comments.originalComment: Kami kesulitan ketika membuang sampah harus keluar kamar mencari tong sampah

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: Dancenter Kuta Alam Near Masjid Oman Al-Makmur Formerly Daka Hotel
comments.responseText:
高重様

貴重なご意見をお寄せいただき、誠にありがとうございます。特に、客室にシャワーがなかったこと、Wi-Fiの電波状況が悪かったことにつきましては、ご不便をおかけしましたことを心よりお詫び申し上げます。お客様のご意見は真摯に受け止め、今後のサービス向上に役立てさせていただきます。

また、チェックイン時に言葉の壁やコミュニケーションの行き違いがあったことをお詫び申し上げます。すべてのお客様に快適にお過ごしいただけるよう、コミュニケーションとサービスの向上に努めてまいります。

貴重なご意見をいただき、誠にありがとうございます。今後ともより良いサービスを提供できるよう努めてまいります。

敬具
ジェームズ
ダンセンター クタ・アラム チーム
comments.reviewComments: For some reason, my room didn't have a shower. It's strange because they handed me a bath towel at check-in. If there wasn't one, it should have been noted. I didn't choose this hotel. I might have misunderstood since I can't speak Indonesian, but I heard that there are no showers in any of the rooms. If that's the case, someone should have mentioned it in the comments. Also, Wi-Fi is only available near the front desk. It's not possible in the room.
comments.originalComment:
なぜか私の部屋にはシャワーがなかった。チェックインの時にバスタオルを渡してくれたのにおかしな話です。ないならないで記載すべき。このホテルを選ばなかった。インドネシア語が話せないので勘違いしているのかもしれませんけども、全部屋にシャワーがないとのこと。
だったら誰かがコメントに記載してもいいはず。
また、Wi-Hiが使えるのはフロントの近くのみ。部屋では無理。

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: Dancenter Kuta Alam Near Masjid Oman Al-Makmur Formerly Daka Hotel
comments.responseText:
Dear Block,

Thank you for your wonderful review! We're delighted to hear you had a great stay with us. We look forward to welcoming you back to Dancenter Kuta Alam soon!

Best regards,
Maria

comments.responseText:
Rinni yang terhormat,

Terima kasih atas pujian Anda terhadap staf dan layanan kami. Kami mohon maaf jika akomodasi yang kami berikan tidak sepenuhnya memenuhi harapan Anda. Umpan balik Anda sangat berharga dan akan membantu kami meningkatkan layanan untuk tamu di masa mendatang.

Dancenter Kuta Alam Dekat Masjid Oman Al-Makmur Sebelumnya Hotel Daka
comments.reviewComments: The service is good and the customer service is friendly, but it is not as advertised.
comments.originalComment: Pelayanan bagus cs ramah².. hanya saja tidak seperti yg di pajang kan

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: Dancenter Kuta Alam Near Masjid Oman Al-Makmur Formerly Daka Hotel
comments.responseText:
Halo Munawar,

Terima kasih telah membagikan pengalaman Anda selama menginap di Dancenter Kuta Alam Near Masjid Oman Al-Makmur. Kami mohon maaf atas ketidaknyamanan terkait kamar yang tidak sesuai dengan pesanan Anda. Masukan Anda sangat berharga bagi kami untuk memperbaiki proses reservasi dan memastikan pengalaman menginap tamu lebih memuaskan di masa mendatang.

Kami berharap dapat memberikan pengalaman yang lebih baik pada kunjungan berikutnya.

Salam hangat,
Barbara

Kepada Tamu yang Terhormat,

Terima kasih telah berbagi masukan mengenai Dancenter Kuta Alam Near Masjid Oman Al-Makmur.

Kami mohon maaf mendengar ketidakpuasan Anda terkait proses deposit. Kebijakan deposit diterapkan sebagai bagian dari peraturan properti demi tujuan keamanan, dan kami menyesalkan segala ketidaknyamanan yang mungkin timbul selama proses *check-in* Anda.

Kami sangat menghargai masukan Anda dan akan terus berupaya meningkatkan komunikasi dengan para tamu.

Salam hangat,
